seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs, and must include at least five uppercase words.
new_constraint: Each paragraph contains no more than one uppercase word.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs, and must include at least five uppercase words. Each paragraph contains no more than one uppercase word.
response:
subject: introduction - [your name]

dear professor [professor's last name],

my name is [your name], and i am a new student in your [course name] class this semester. i am genuinely EXCITED to be taking your course, as i have a deep interest in [mention a specific area related to the course]. i am hoping to gain a much clearer understanding of [mention a specific topic] through your lectures and readings.

my academic goals are quite focused. i aim to develop a STRONG foundation in [mention a skill or subject area] and ultimately pursue a career in [mention your career field]. i believe that your expertise in this field will be INVALUABLE to my development. i am a very DILIGENT student and am prepared to put in the necessary effort.

i look forward to meeting you in person soon and contributing positively to the class discussions. please let me know if there is anything i should read or prepare before our first major assignment. thank you for your time and consideration.

sincerely,

[your name]
[your student id]<turn|>

evaluation_result:
**Step 1**: The extracted content from the Model Response.  
- "i am genuinely EXCITED to be taking your course, as i have a deep interest in [mention a specific area related to the course]."  
- "i aim to develop a STRONG foundation in [mention a skill or subject area] and ultimately pursue a career in [mention your career field]."  
- "i believe that your expertise in this field will be INVALUABLE to my development."  
- "i am a very DILIGENT student and am prepared to put in the necessary effort."  

**Step 2**:  
- Instruction 1 requires the email to consist of exactly three paragraphs and include at least five uppercase words. The Model Response meets the three-paragraph requirement and contains five uppercase words ("EXCITED," "STRONG," "INVALUABLE," "DILIGENT"). Therefore, all constraints of Instruction 1 are satisfied.  
- Instruction 2 requires each paragraph to contain no more than one uppercase word. The Model Response violates this constraint, as the second paragraph contains three uppercase words ("STRONG," "INVALUABLE," "DILIGENT").  

**Step 3**: 1
